resposta:
solution: ```python
class Solution:
    def reversePrefix(self, word: str, ch: str) -> str:
        idx = word.find(ch)
        if idx == -1:
            return word
        return word[:idx+1][::-1] + word[idx+1:]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Locate the first occurrence of ch with str.find; if absent return original string. Reverse the prefix up to and including that index via slicing and concatenation. Simple, single-pass, minimal extra memory.
